expectations.text: Identifies all three methods have silent failure patterns (try? in loadOrders, try? in placeOrder, unhandled throw in deleteOrder)
Identifies that placeOrder's two try? calls create a logic error (confirmation email sent even if order submission fails)
Identifies print('Order placed successfully') is invisible in production (not part of unified logging system)
Identifies Task.detached strips priority and cancellation propagation (rarely correct choice)
Provides fix with os.Logger using privacy annotations (not just print or generic logging)
Adds ErrorReporter.recordNonFatal() or crash SDK call in every catch block
